g.text: Runtime view: review → freeze loop (design level, ADR-013)
Precondition (live today): the pipeline froze this record with
TARIFHUB_REVIEW_THRESHOLD); it sits flagged in the review queue.</color>
frozen: record leaves the review queue
record stays in the review queue
guard-protected: versioning/ and audit/ are write-protected
against AI edits (guard_frozen hook); the freeze line is enforced
Console form + review endpoint are ADR-013 design scope,
not yet implemented; freeze(), audit and flagging are live today
Flagged record → expert decision → new immutable version. freeze(), audit and flagging are live; the review surface is designed.
